calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-07-2005 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-03-2005 Reset To Jul-07-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carl Salcedo.
Michael Byron Cohen, Esq. for Petitioner: Teo Spengler, not present, out of country (France), as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Susannah Elsie Laugier.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent, proof of service and notice, the OSC for Change of Name of the Minor is continued to July 7, 2005 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to submit proof of service to the Minor's father of the new OSC hearing date or Order dispensing with notice, and for the Petitioner to appear at the next OSC hearing date.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
